question_text: A student exerts a force of 50 N on the ground through their shoes. Compare the pressure if the contact area is 0.01 m² versus 0.02 m², and explain the difference.
correct_answer: At 0.01 m²: P = 5000 Pa. At 0.02 m²: P = 2500 Pa. The smaller area creates twice the pressure because pressure is inversely proportional to area.
explanation: Pressure = 50 N ÷ 0.01 m² = 5000 Pa and Pressure = 50 N ÷ 0.02 m² = 2500 Pa. When area doubles, pressure halves (if force stays constant). This shows why tight shoes with small contact areas can feel uncomfortable.
